_readme: Curated FACEIT competition registry (Roadmap Phase B1).
FACEIT is authoritative for match FACTS ONLY (teams, rosters, schedule,
series result, bracket) — never compositions. This registry tells the
discovery layer WHICH FACEIT championships/tournaments count as official
professional OWCS, so we never rely on unrestricted text search over all
of FACEIT on every run (see B1: 'Do not rely on unrestricted text search').
A competition is ingested only if it is listed here AND enabled. Every
entry declares an explicit inclusion tier (see the roadmap's 'Definition
of all pro games'): tier 1 = global live events / regional playoffs /
regional regular seasons; tier 2 = promotion-relegation, official
qualifiers, FACEIT League Master feeders; tier 3 = other approved
professional events with an official broadcast.
IDs below are placeholders (championshipId/organizerId begin with the
region tag) — fill them with real FACEIT Data API ids as they are
confirmed. An entry with a null championshipId stays disabled and is
surfaced by source reconciliation (B4) as 'no known FACEIT competition'

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 — North America
competitions.notes: Set championshipId from the FACEIT Data API, then enable.
